plugins.successComment: This ${issue.pull_request ? 'PR is included' : 'issue has been resolved'} in version ${nextRelease.version} :tada:

plugins.changelogTitle:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

plugins.prepareCmd: bash -c "set -euo pipefail; perl -0777 -i -pe 's/^version = \".*?\"/version = \"${nextRelease.version}\"/m' Cargo.toml; cargo generate-lockfile"
